title: Xtra Smoky Malaysian Sirloin Steak Satay
description: A smoky and creamy Malaysian dish featuring sirloin steak tips, perfect for a low-fat meal prep option. This recipe combines the flavors of Malaysia with a healthy twist.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, peanut oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sirloin steak tips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated steak tips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the satay for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit.
Transfer the satay to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Steam the satay for an additional 2-3 minutes to finish cooking.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
